description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with green lawns, shrubs, and trees. The structure features a combination of white exterior walls and dark, angular gable roofs, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The front includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a paved walkway, and decorative flower beds. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, a patio area with lounge chairs, and a cylindrical water tank. The property is bordered by a mix of hedges and fencing, offering privacy and a well-defined perimeter. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of functional and aesthetic landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with dark gable roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, a driveway, garage, pool, and fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, flower beds, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side lawn, water tank, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large glass doors, backyard patio, pool, lounge chairs, and privacy fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, pool, water tank, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors on rear facade
